summary: Iteration 28: Customer Override soft-delete feature FULLY WORKING. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified REASIGNADO badge, 'orig: {name}' secondary text, override modal, customer search, and save flow all working correctly in VentasTab.

performance_issues.issue: Slow loading continues with default 3-month date range (121K+ orders). Database query causes extended loading spinners (>30s). VentasTab in cuenta detail panel loads much faster as workaround.

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/orders/{order_id}/override-customer returns active=true, updated_at, updated_by fields
Backend: GET /api/orders/{order_id}/override-customer returns ONLY active=true overrides
Backend: DELETE soft-deletes (sets active=false, returns deactivated=true NOT deleted=true)
Backend: After soft-delete, GET returns override=null
Backend: After soft-delete, v_comercial_order_header shows has_override=false
Backend: POST after soft-delete re-activates existing record (same ID, new updated_at)
Backend: GET /api/comercial/orders returns original_partner_name field for overridden orders
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/list still works (regression test passed)
Frontend: Override modal opens with correct order info and current customer
Frontend: Customer search works (debounced, returns results)
Frontend: Selecting customer and clicking Reasignar creates override successfully
Frontend: Success toast 'Orden reasignada a {name}' appears
Frontend: VentasTab shows 'orig: {original_partner_name}' secondary text below order name
action_items: PERFORMANCE: ComercialPage remains slow - consider reducing default date range or adding query indexes
All soft-delete and original_partner_name features working correctly
critical_code_review_comments: orders.py: Soft-delete correctly implemented - DELETE sets active=false, not physical delete
orders.py: POST correctly re-activates existing row after soft-delete (same ID reused)
db.py: Partial unique index idx_override_order_active WHERE active=true ensures only one active override per order
db.py: Views v_comercial_mov_flat and v_comercial_order_header correctly use AND ov.active=true in JOINs
VentasTab.jsx: REASIGNADO badge with data-testid='override-badge' and 'orig: {name}' secondary text working
ComercialPage.jsx: HeadersTable shows REASIGNADO badge and original client info correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (VentasTab fully tested with override creation and badge display)

test_credentials.test_order_id: 125714 (order 6289/23825) - override created and soft-deleted during test

seed_data_creation: None - used existing PostgreSQL data via PG_URL connection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Soft-delete override feature fully working. Key changes: DELETE now returns {ok: true, deactivated: true} instead of {deleted: true}. POST after soft-delete reuses existing row (same ID). All JOINs filter AND ov.active=true. VentasTab shows REASIGNADO badge (data-testid='override-badge') with amber background and 'orig: {name}' secondary text in gray. ComercialPage continues to have slow loading due to large dataset - use VentasTab within cuenta detail for faster testing.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no bugs found. All soft-delete, active flag, updated_at/updated_by, and original_partner_name features working correctly per requirements.
